use_cases: Creating interactive cursor effects that follow user mouse movement with smooth spring physics
Adding visual feedback through animated elements that respond to pointer events
Building engaging hero sections with dynamic cursor-following elements
Enhancing user experience with subtle, playful motion effects
Creating custom cursor overlays for branded website experiences
ai_summary: A mouse follow animation component built with Framer Motion that tracks cursor position using spring physics for smooth, natural movement. The collection includes two variants: SimpleMouseFollow with basic position tracking, and SpringMouseFollow with additional scale and opacity animations. Both components respond to pointer events to show/hide the follower element with elegant spring-based transitions.
